project.name: Agent PM
project.description: Legacy debug/admin example for the fallback CLI path. Normal use should prefer approved markdown plans and repo-first handoff artifacts.

docs.title: Home
docs.content:
# Agent PM

This example exists to exercise the fallback CLI/debug path.

## Notes

- Normal use should keep the approved plan in the repo
- Decomposition and review should happen before Notion mutation
- Codex Apps Notion MCP is the preferred interactive Notion path

docs.title: Architecture
docs.content:
# Architecture

- The repo is the planning source of truth
- `pm` is the fallback debug/admin CLI
- Notion is the downstream execution surface
- Notion MCP is the preferred interactive mutation path

tasks.title: Bootstrap Notion bridge foundation
tasks.description: Set up the local bridge, Notion project structure, and shared task database.

tasks.title: Publish Notion view setup guide
tasks.description: Create the one-time board, timeline, and filtered table setup instructions.

tasks.title: Generate dashboard snapshot
tasks.description: Publish a bridge-side dashboard artifact and sync it into Notion.
